The text claims the screenshot title in Korean includes the points '3 victims were all outsourced' and 'preliminary determination of violation'. However, looking at the image, the main title is "[긴급 브리핑] 영덕군 풍력발전기 정비 중 화재 사고 관련" ( [Emergency Briefing] Yeongdeok-gun Wind Turbine Maintenance Fire Accident Related), which does not contain the phrase '3 victims were all outsourced'. The image's table shows three different affiliations: "XX-ENG", "Power Operation Center (OE)", and "Triangle-Triangle Industry". This contradicts the claim that all three were from a single company. The image shows distinct company names, refuting the text's summary.
